name: GitHub Actions Runner
description: Self-hosted GitHub Actions runner. Registers itself with the configured repo on container start and pre-runs Docker-in-LXC for workflows that build images (e.g. step2b-install-deployer.sh).

parameters.name: GitHub Repository URL
parameters.description: Full URL of the GitHub repository the runner registers against (e.g. https://github.com/proxvex/proxvex).

parameters.name: GitHub PAT
parameters.description: Fine-grained PAT with 'Administration: Read and write' on the repository. The runner uses it once at boot to fetch a registration token; not stored on GitHub.

parameters.name: Runner Name
parameters.description: Display name shown in GitHub Settings → Actions → Runners.

parameters.name: Runner Labels
parameters.description: Comma-separated labels used in workflow `runs-on:` selectors.
